title: query_contacts with only blocked filter uses ?2 parameter in WHERE but binds to slot 1
description: store.rs query_contacts builds dynamic SQL with conditions 'presence = ?1' and/or 'blocked = ?2'; when called with presence=None and blocked=Some(b), the SQL is 'WHERE blocked = ?2' but .bind(i64::from(b)) fills parameter slot 1, leaving slot 2 (the one in the SQL) unbound — SQLite returns a binding error at runtime, so ChatContact/query with {filter:{blocked:true}} fails with a database error
